content:
DEAL NOTE
Customer: Bluewater Financial
Customer ID: C003
Contract ID: K003
Account Executive: Sarah Chen
Deal Type: New Business
Date: July 1, 2023

DEAL SUMMARY
Closed Bluewater Financial on InsightIQ Starter at 5 users, $4,800 ARR. No discount. Longer sales cycle of eight weeks due to compliance review requirements.

DISCOVERY NOTES
Champion is Marcus Webb, Head of Financial Analytics. Bluewater needed a reporting tool that could handle their regulatory reporting workflows without exposing sensitive client data outside their internal environment. InsightIQ's data residency controls and role-based access features were key to winning the deal.

CLOSING NOTES
Compliance and legal review took six weeks. Their DPO requested a data processing agreement which our legal team turned around in three days. The 5-user Starter deal is intentionally small — Bluewater wants to run a controlled pilot with the analytics team before expanding.

EXPANSION POTENTIAL
Marcus Webb indicated the platform could expand to their risk and portfolio teams if the pilot is successful. Potential to grow to 25+ users by mid-2024. Flag for expansion conversation at 90-day mark.
